title: May 28
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|May}}

'''May 28''' is the 148th day (149th in leap years) of the year, with 217 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1920s#1929|1929]] – [[Shane Rimmer]] is born.
*[[1930s#1938|1938]] – [[Alan Harris]] is born.
*[[1950s#1950|1950]] – [[Denny Delk]] is born.
*[[1973]] - [[Drew Campbell]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Liam O'Brien]] is born.
*[[1981]] – [[Laura Bailey]] is born.
*[[1985]] – [[Emily O'Brien]] is born.
*[[2002]] – ''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]'' published.
*[[2007]] – ''[[Star Wars Tech]]'' and ''[[Star Wars: The Legacy Revealed]]'' air on [[Wikipedia:History (TV channel)|The History Channel]].
*2007 – [[Celebration IV]] ends.
*[[2009]] – ''[[Lost Tribe of the Sith: Precipice]]'' released.
*2009 – ''[[The Clone Wars: The Wind Raiders of Taloraan]]'' published.
*[[2014]] – [[Rebel Heist 2|''Rebel Heist'' 2]] published.
*2014 – [[The Star Wars 8|''The Star Wars'' 8]] published.
*2014 – [[Legacy (2013) 15|''Legacy'' (2013) 15]] published.
*[[2019]] – ''[[Star Wars Search and Find Volume II]]'' published.
*[[2020]] – "[[Luke Skywalker Trains with Master Yoda]]" airs on YouTube.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars Use the Force!]]'' published.
*[[2021]] – "[[Rampage (episode)|Rampage]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*[[2024]] – ''[[The High Republic: The Eye of Darkness]]'' reprinted in paperback.
*[[2025]] – [[The Rise of Skywalker Adaptation 4|''The Rise of Skywalker Adaptation'' 4]] published.
*[[2027]] - ''[[Star Wars: Starfighter]]'' to be released.
<noinclude>
